uplink.description: Climate periodic uplink: ambient temperature + humidity + battery voltage (fPort 1)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; channel 0x01 register stream — ambientTemperature 0x82 raw 2285 x0.01 = 22.85 C, ambientHumidity 0x83 = 54 %, batteryVoltage 0x6C raw 38 x0.1 = 3.8 V. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js then normalizing (ambient* -> air.*, batteryVoltage -> battery).

uplink.description: Relay channels + internal-circuit diagnostics + sub-zero ambient (fPort 1)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; exercises relay channel state/counter (kept as camelCase extras), internal-circuit temp/humidity diagnostics (NOT mapped to air.*), and negative ambient temperature (0x82 two's-complement 0xFEA2 = -350 x0.01 = -3.5 C). expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js, renormalized.

uplink.description: Generic device info: external power, model, firmware version, battery percent (fPort 50)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds generic-data payload (channel 0xFF). batteryPercentage 0x6D = 77 % -> camelCase extra batteryPercent (vocabulary battery is volts). firmwareVersion 0x69 DIGIT:false renders V<major>.<minor>. expected.data from reference/upstream-codec.js, renormalized (constant codecVersion/genericModel/productCode/manufacturer identity fields dropped).
Synthetic; upstream treats any 1-byte payload as a downlink ack (0 = success). Upstream emits this under key `info`; renamed to camelCase extra `downlinkAck`.

uplink.description: Unknown register type on device-data fPort (error)
uplink._note: Synthetic error vector; type 0xEE (238) is not in any register table, so upstream sets an error. Mirrors upstream error string from reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic error vector; fPort 6 falls outside generic (50-99), device (1-5), alarm (11) and parameter (100) ranges. Mirrors upstream error string.
